name: flow-agents-governance
description: Local Veritas repo standards for Flow Agents development. This stays optional and adapter-boundary scoped.

rules.message: Flow Agents source instructions must keep the canonical source-of-truth framing.

explain.summary: Agent instruction files are governance surface. They must continue to identify this repo as the canonical Flow Agents source.
mustDo: Keep AGENTS.md present and scoped to Flow Agents source behavior.
Route instruction changes through normal workflow evidence.
mustNotDo: Replace source-of-truth guidance with generated bundle instructions.

rules.message: Workflow contract or sidecar schema changes should include eval coverage.

explain.summary: Workflow state is a reliability boundary. Contract, schema, and sidecar writer changes need executable coverage.
mustDo: Add or update static/integration evals when workflow contracts or sidecar schemas change.
Record eval evidence in Flow Agents evidence sidecars.

rules.message: Runtime hook changes should include hook influence or steering eval updates.

explain.summary: Hook behavior is a just-in-time guidance boundary. Hook changes need eval evidence that guidance still reaches agents or fails honestly.
mustDo: Update hook integration or hook-influence cases when runtime hook behavior changes.
Document runtime gaps instead of implying live influence.
